title: 10 best herbal teas for itchy scalp
description: Aloe vera teas helps with itchy scalp because it has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that calm irritated skin. The gel extracted from the Aloe vera plant contains compounds like aloin and aloe-emodin, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Drinking Aloe vera tea may also help to balance the body's pH levels, which can contribute to an itchy scalp.
